provenance.purpose: Story 4.4 (D5 §5d) — the shared fixture corpus's synthetic stub rects for the D1.1d renderer-first proof. SceneBusRenderer is anchored to THESE static rects (node-id -> RectLike) instead of a live getBoundingClientRect(), so the interface-conformance proof never depends on real card layout/reflow (that is Epic 6).
provenance.synthetic_note: INVENTED screen-px layout coordinates — NOT a live DOM capture. They stand in for where the six Epic-6 ecosystem cards WILL sit; only their being static + hermetic matters here. Deliberately DIFFERENT from HeroSvg's 1024x687 NODE_XY/BUS_XY so the R1 proof can show the two renderers share derivation while differing in coordinates.
provenance.units: CSS pixels (a getBoundingClientRect()-shaped {left, top, width, height} subset)
